title: Zorbit Dashboard Widget Types
description: Enum definition for supported dashboard widget types and their rendering metadata.

description.description: Short description of what this widget type renders.

icon.description: Material Icon name for this widget type.

supports_config.description: Config keys supported by this widget type.

widget_types.label: Count
widget_types.description: Displays a single numeric value with optional icon and color.

widget_types.label: Chart
widget_types.description: Renders data as a line, bar, pie, doughnut, or area chart.

widget_types.label: Table
widget_types.description: Displays tabular data with configurable columns.

widget_types.label: List
widget_types.description: Displays a vertical list of items with optional icons.

widget_types.label: Gauge
widget_types.description: Displays a gauge meter with min/max range and color thresholds.
